title: God of War Custom Items
description: Replaces weapon/tool/item models when renamed in an anvil. Inspired by God of War. Works with OptiFine, or CIT Resewn + Custom Entity Models mod.
body:
![God of War Custom Items](https://i.imgur.com/rPDpccS.png)
# God of War Custom Items

A resource pack inspired by the famous video game, ***God of War***!

### (Requires: OptiFine 1.13+)

**IMPORTANT NOTE:** The V4 version **ONLY** includes the newer, **512x** models!

## You can:

- Showcase the resource pack in any format if you credit me.
- Share the resource pack with the Modrinth link.
- Use the resource pack on any server.
- Modify the resource pack for private use only!
 

## You can't:

- Claim the resource pack as your own.
- Modify the resource pack for public use.
- Reupload any contents of the resource pack to anywhere.
- Showcase or share the resource pack without properly crediting the author.

### WARNING: If you disregard ANY of the above statements, measures will be taken to prevent any kind of theft! Thank you for understanding.
 
## About

This resource pack aims to add most of the iconic weapons from the ***God of War*** universe to **Minecraft**.

## Contents:

- **Leviathan Axe:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword / axe* to a name including ***"leviathan"***
- **Mjolnir:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword / axe* to a name including ***"mjolnir"***
- **Retractable Guardian Shield:** Rename a *shield* to a name including ***"guardian"***
- **Blade of Chaos:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword* to a name including ***"chaos"***
- **Claws of Hades:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword / pickaxe / hoe* to a name including ***"hades"***
- **Draupnir Spear:** Rename a *diamond / netherite sword* or a bow to a name including ***"draupnir"***
- **Idunn Apple:** Replaces the *Golden Apple* texture
- **Mimir, the Smartest Man Alive:** Replaces the *Totem of Undying* along with its sound effect (name is changed to ***Mimir, the Smartest Man Alive***)
 
### Requirements: OptiFine (or OptiFabric with working OptiFine) 1.13+!

## Installation & Check your settings
- Move the ".zip" file to the "...\.minecraft\resourcepacks\" folder. In the game, activate the resource pack and you're good to go! 
- In Options -> Video Settings -> Quality, set the Custom Items to "On" in order for the resource pack to work properly!

## THANK YOU!

If you would like to **support** me, please consider **subscribing** to my **YouTube** channel for more content like this in the future! You also have the option to **donate** me on **PayPal**!

### I really hope you'll enjoy the resource pack! Have fun!
